visa_types.name: Already Authorized Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/travel-insurance).
Please print out this Checklist and prepare the required documents, accordingly, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
Note:
- Kindly make sure that your application contains sufficient, correct and adequate information. All information must be correct and reflect your planned trip.
- An applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- All Supporting documents should be submitted in both original and copy.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[che > nga > en > Official / Diplomatic > Visa Fees]
Service Charges 

[che > nga > en > Official / Diplomatic > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice and the difference amount needs to be paid in the Visa Application Center while submitting the visa application or if service fees plus the value added services fees has been paid extra refund request (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/refund-policy) can be raised for the extra fees which is paid online.
- The mode of payment in the visa application center is via Debit or Credit Card (Naira Card), Bank Transfer and QR
- The service fee is inclusive of VAT and is non-refundable and non-transferable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/premium-services).
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 calendar days (starting from the time when the Embassy received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A work visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for work purposes. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days. It does not apply to persons taking up residence in Switzerland
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A work visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for work purposes. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days. It does not apply to persons taking up residence in Switzerland

## Visa Fees

[che > nga > en > Official / Diplomatic > Visa Fees]
Service Charges 

[che > nga > en > Official / Diplomatic > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice and the difference amount needs to be paid in the Visa Application Center while submitting the visa application or if service fees plus the value added services fees has been paid extra refund request (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/refund-policy) can be raised for the extra fees which is paid online.
- The mode of payment in the visa application center is via Debit or Credit Card (Naira Card), Bank Transfer and QR
- The service fee is inclusive of VAT and is non-refundable and non-transferable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/premium-services).

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/travel-insurance).
Please print out this Checklist and prepare the required documents, accordingly, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
Note:
- Kindly make sure that your application contains sufficient, correct and adequate information. All information must be correct and reflect your planned trip.
- An applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- All Supporting documents should be submitted in both original and copy.

## Photo Specifications
One (1) passport photograph in color, 35x45mm, white background, not older than three (3) months and of good quality.
Head coverings are not permitted except for religious reasons.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Switzerland Visa Application Centre or visit website (https://home-affairs.ec.europa.eu/system/files_en?file=2016-12/icao_photograph_guidelines_en.pdf).

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 calendar days (starting from the time when the Embassy received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.name: Schengen Visa
visa_types.overview:
For persons wishing to enter Switzerland for a short stay of up to 90 days within a 180-day period: for example, in a context of tourism, a visit to relatives or friends, short-term language studies, participating in a conference or in sporting/cultural events, etc.
Calculation of Short Stay Calculator (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/aufenthaltsrechner.html)
Information about Visa Obligation please click here (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/merkblatt_einreise.html)
Visa types under Schengen Visa
- Official / Diplomatic (?tab=overview#official/diplomatic)
- Business (?tab=overview#business)
- Tourism (?tab=overview#tourism)
- Visiting Family and Friends (?tab=overview#visitingfamilyandfriends)
- Sports (?tab=overview#sports)
- Medical Treatment (?tab=overview#medicaltreatment)
- Already Authorized Work Visa (?tab=overview#alreadyauthorizedworkvisa)
- Airport Transit Visa (?tab=overview#airporttransitvisa)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Citizens of Nigeria need a transit visa even if they are staying in the international transit area of the airport and do not enter the Schengen territory.
visa_types.full_text:

visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 calendar days (starting from the time when the Embassy received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Official visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for official purposes. This visa is given for travel periods of less than 90 days This visa will be issued for official purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Official visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for official purposes. This visa is given for travel periods of less than 90 days This visa will be issued for official purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[che > nga > en > Official / Diplomatic > Visa Fees]
Service Charges 

[che > nga > en > Official / Diplomatic > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice and the difference amount needs to be paid in the Visa Application Center while submitting the visa application or if service fees plus the value added services fees has been paid extra refund request (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/refund-policy) can be raised for the extra fees which is paid online.
- The mode of payment in the visa application center is via Debit or Credit Card (Naira Card), Bank Transfer and QR
- The service fee is inclusive of VAT and is non-refundable and non-transferable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/premium-services).

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/nga/en/che/travel-insurance).
Please print out this Checklist and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
Note:
- Kindly make sure that your application contains sufficient, correct and adequate information. All information must be correct and reflect your planned trip.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- All Supporting documents should be submitted in both original and copy.

## Photo Specifications
One (1) passport photograph in color, 35x45mm, white background, not older than three (3) months and of good quality.
Head coverings are not permitted except for religious reasons.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Switzerland Visa Application Centre or visit website (https://home-affairs.ec.europa.eu/system/files_en?file=2016-12/icao_photograph_guidelines_en.pdf).

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 calendar days (starting from the time when the Embassy received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
